description: A new IFC4 project has been set up in BlenderBIM (Bonsai) with a basic spatial hierarchy (IfcProject 'My Project' > IfcSite 'My Site' > IfcBuilding 'My Building' > IfcBuildingStorey 'My Storey' at elevation 0.0). Model a single-storey commercial retail unit within this project. The building has a 12m x 8m rectangular footprint and 3.2m floor-to-ceiling height. It contains three rooms: a main retail area (~60 sq m) along the south facade, a back-of-house storage room (~20 sq m), and a staff WC (~4 sq m) accessible from storage. The building envelope consists of four external IfcWall elements (200mm thick) forming a closed rectangular perimeter and two internal IfcWall partitions (100mm thick) dividing the three rooms. Include a ground floor IfcSlab and a flat roof IfcSlab. Place an external IfcDoor (1.0m x 2.1m) centered on the south wall and an internal IfcDoor (0.9m x 2.1m) between the retail area and storage. Define an IfcSpace for each room with a descriptive LongName. All elements must be contained within the building storey. Save the project as /home/ga/BIMProjects/retail_unit.ifc.
